chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1251 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.2.2016 1. For Orders on MA 2030/16 2. For Orders on MA 1633/16 3. For Orders on Office Objection 4. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Liaquat Ali Larik, Advocate for petitioners Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. Mr. Inam Malik, Advocate has filed power on behalf of Respondent No.8 which is taken on record. Petitioners are present in person. Petitioner No.1 states that her parents are causing harassment to her and her husband as she has contracted marriage against their will and wish. Her parents are present and her mother was allowed to sit with her for some time, but she could not persuade the petitioners to reside with them. In the circumstances, learned A.A.G. is directed to provide due protection of law to the petitioners and further ensure that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. The petition in above terms is disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
